title: Traditional Medicine

vocabulary.meaning: a plant used for cooking or healing
a treatment used to help a health problem
rubbing the body to help it relax or feel better
coming from nature, not made by chemicals

questions: What springs to mind when you hear the term 'traditional medicine'?
What traditional medicine do you know about?
Have you tried any traditional medicine?
Do you think traditional medicine is just a trend that goes in and out of fashion?
Do you think traditional medicine works?
What kind of people use traditional medicine?
Do you think traditional medicines work better than modern drugs?
Do you think doctors should study about and be experts in traditional medicine?
Do you think traditional medicines are tried, tested and safe?
Why do you think so little is known about the health benefits of traditional medicine?
Would you like to try acupuncture? Cupping? Massage?
Do you think the medicine in Western hospitals is traditional medicine in other countries?
What would you like to know about traditional medicine?
Do you know anyone who uses traditional medicine?
